expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: historical analogs become required-before-ship gates
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly addresses the case focus and the required-before-ship gate concept: it states the Phase 5b contract "requires that relevant historical analogs be rendered as explicit [ANALOG-GATE] items in the release recommendation ... and treated as required-before-ship gates" and concludes the run fails because such enforcement is not demonstrated due to missing Phase 5b artifacts.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The output is structured around Phase 5b requirements and artifacts (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, qa_plan_phase5b). It repeatedly anchors evaluation to the Phase 5b rubric/contract (review-rubric-phase5b.md) and evaluates absence of Phase 5b deliverables; this is alignment with Phase 5b as the primary phase, even though the verdict is FAIL for missing Phase 5b outputs.
